summary: Closed, unmerged PR attempting to match grInishie1_801FA9B4, with additional edits in gryorster.c and lbsnap.c. The diff adds stage data/literal storage and rewrites OSReport use in grinishie1.c, adjusts a DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP argument through a local, changes a Yorster loop using casts/manual increment, and rewrites lbSnap_8001DF20 to use descriptor and offset locals. The only human comment says the author still had not hard-reverted and calls it a mistake, so the slice should be treated as weak historical evidence and not as an accepted matching pattern.

key_files.role: Primary target for the PR title; adds grI1_803E48C8 stage block data, grI1_803E4944 path string, grInishie1_StageData/grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8 filename string, rewrites callback access in grInishie1_801FA9B4, rewrites OSReport arguments, and introduces a local jobj2 before DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP.
Secondary stage/ground edit; rewrites grYorster_80202428 loop shape with a temp variable, pointer-to-s32 load, u32 casts, manual loop increment, and temporary newValue.
Library edit; rewrites lbSnap_8001DF20 to use descPtr and offset locals before assigning x14/x1C and calling lb_8001C4A8.

what_changed.text: Added grI1_803E48C8 as an s16 array and used it in newly added stage data as an S16Vec3 pointer.
Added grI1_803E4944 string '/GrI1.dat', grInishie1_StageData wrapper struct, grI1_803E4950 stage data plus report format storage, and grI1_803E49A8 string 'grinishie1.c'.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 callback lookup from &grI1_803E48F4[arg0] to a casted byte-offset expression based on grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c.
Changed grInishie1_801FA9B4 OSReport call from inline string literals to grI1_803E4950.report_fmt_get_gobj and grI1_803E49A8.
Changed grInishie1_801FBC4C to assign gp->gv.inishie1.blocks[index].jobj2 to a local HSD_JObj* before passing it to DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP.

Changed grYorster_80202428 loop from a normal for-loop increment and direct pointer comparison to manual increment, a temp s32 load through a cast, u32 comparison casts, and a newValue local before assignment.
Changed lbSnap_8001DF20 to introduce descPtr and offset locals and assign through descPtr before calling lb_8001C4A8.
PR was closed with merged_at null, and the only issue comment states: 'Still haven't hard reverted. My mistake again'.

smart_moves.text: Using a local HSD_JObj* before DOBJ_CLEAR_LOOP is a narrow local-lifetime/codegen tactic that may be easier to inspect than repeating the full field expression, but this PR provides no verifier evidence that it was required or accepted.
Introducing descPtr and offset in lbSnap_8001DF20 makes dataflow explicit, but the slice does not show build, objdiff, review, or merge evidence supporting it as the right source form.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not treat closed, unmerged matching attempts with an author comment calling the state a mistake as accepted style or match evidence.

Data/literal rewrites made inside a code-match PR require extra caution: this slice replaced inline OSReport strings with newly added data-backed fields and filename storage, but contains no acceptance or verification evidence.

Casted byte-offset access from one data symbol into another adjacent object is weak source evidence unless backed by section ownership or objdiff evidence; this PR changes grI1_803E48F4 access to a cast based on grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c without loaded proof.

naming_conventions.name: grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4944, grI1_803E4950, grI1_803E49A8
naming_conventions.observation: New globals use address-style grI1_ prefixes rather than semantic names.

naming_conventions.name: grInishie1_StageData
naming_conventions.observation: A local wrapper typedef is named after the stage and embeds StageData plus a report format field.

naming_conventions.name: report_fmt_get_gobj
naming_conventions.observation: Field name describes the OSReport format string used when Ground_GetStageGObj returns NULL.

naming_conventions.name: descPtr, offset, snap, temp, newValue, jobj2
naming_conventions.observation: New locals use role or temporary names; the PR provides no review evidence accepting these names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce data objects and reference their fields instead of inline literals, including OSReport format and source filename strings.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Conflicts with standards that warn against string-literal-to-symbol and data-section edits in focused code-matching PRs without ownership evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use pointer arithmetic and casting to derive StageCallbacks from an adjacent s16 data array address plus 0x2c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Looks like data-layout compensation rather than typed source access; no verifier evidence is loaded.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Widen or alter local lifetimes by splitting declarations and assignments, such as declaring gobj before assigning and using jobj2 before a macro call.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Local lifetime steering needs explicit objdiff/build evidence before being treated as reviewable source.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Change a normal for-loop into manual increment form with casts and a temporary integer load for pointer comparison.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Comments in the diff explicitly describe matching-oriented casts/manual increment; no loaded evidence shows the tactic was accepted.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce descriptor pointer and offset locals in lbSnap_8001DF20 before field stores and function call.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Could be local stack/register shaping, but the PR slice has no objdiff or review evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR #2558 is closed/unmerged and should not be treated as accepted match evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: The slice for PR #2558 contains a matching-attempt diff for grInishie1_801FA9B4 plus edits in gryorster.c and lbsnap.c, but the PR is closed with merged_at null and the only issue comment says: 'Still haven't hard reverted. My mistake again'. Use it as cautionary historical evidence, not accepted source style.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2558 touched grinishie1 stage data and function 801FA9B4 but was closed unmerged
source_update_candidates.text: Historical PR #2558 targeted src/melee/gr/grinishie1.c / grInishie1_801FA9B4 and added data/literal storage around grI1_803E48C8, grI1_803E4950, and OSReport, but it was closed with merged_at null and an author comment saying it had not been hard-reverted and was a mistake.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for future searches so curators and agents do not misread this closed PR as accepted evidence for grinishie1 data or OSReport string ownership.

source_update_candidates.title: Closed mistake PRs should be excluded from accepted matching-style examples
source_update_candidates.text: When a PR is closed/unmerged and contains author text indicating the branch was not hard-reverted or was a mistake, its diff may still be searchable as historical context but should not be promoted as accepted naming, data ownership, or matching tactic evidence without later corroboration.
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards cover verification and evidence, but this PR provides a concrete example where historical diff content is contradicted by closure state and author comment.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the casted grI1_803E48C8 + 0x2c callback lookup as a valid typed access pattern; it conflicts with typed-fields/data-ownership standards and lacks verification evidence.
Do not promote the OSReport string-to-data rewrite as accepted data ownership; the PR is unmerged and lacks section/symbol evidence.
Do not infer that grYorster_80202428 should use manual increment, u32 casts, or pointer-to-s32 loads; the diff comments indicate matching-oriented changes but no acceptance evidence exists.
Do not infer reviewer intent; there are no review comments or reviews in the loaded slice.
